EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IMultidimensionalInfo3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a multidimensional info value object.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("CA498124-469B-4BE1-9E25-1A78BE553F78")]
public interface IMultidimensionalInfo3 : IMultidimensionalInfo2, IMultidimensionalInfo

IPropertySet

Layout

The multidimensional raster layout.

int Layout { get; set; }

int

The number of slices for all variables.)
